title: andruris japonica
intro: Andruris japonica, also known as Japanese angelica tree, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, particularly andrographolide, which has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable medicinal plant. The health benefits of Andruris japonica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against cardiovascular diseases. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
